meta.title: Coconut | Ambassadors
meta.description: Coconut was brought into a wildlife rehab center as a baby. He imprinted during the rehab process and then was deemed non-releasable.

data.name: Coconut
data.story: Coconut was brought into a wildlife rehab center as a baby. He imprinted during the rehab process and then was deemed non-releasable.
data.mission: He is an ambassador for educating people on the misconceptions that wildlife face as well as human-wildlife conflict.
